baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +$1 cash in any year with negative GMI. General CEO stacks — CEO + card = $2 per neg year with just one DEF asset at T1 mid.
+1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 14.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 14.

flavourText: Information is ammunition. Classified information is a monopoly.
